title: Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from the Middle East, featuring tender lamb kebabs served with a variety of spices and herbs.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pat the lamb dry with a paper towel before threading onto skewers.

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
7. Transfer the kebabs to a serving platter and garnish with chopped parsley.
